name: siwu
description: 思悟 Agent —— 以辩证唯物主义方法论为认知内核的 AI 智能体
author: Mourpheuon

scripts.dev: concurrently -n py,web -c blue,green "python -m uvicorn siwu.api.server:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "cd siwu/web && npx vite"
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently -n py,electron -c blue,magenta "python -m uvicorn siwu.api.server:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000" "npx electron ."
scripts.electron:build: cd siwu/web && npx vite build && cd ../.. && npx electron-builder
